datapoints.description: CPU cores currently used in this namespace quota

description: Per-namespace resource quota utilization for CPU, memory, and pod counts via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Multi-instance per namespace. Discovery finds namespaces with ResourceQuota objects via kube_resourcequota{type=hard}. CPU/memory percentages computed as (used/hard)*100. Only discovers namespaces that have quotas defined.
name: OCP_ResourceQuota_Usage
